rationale: The citing paper explicitly states it extends Pareto/NBD/BG-NBD customer-base models and derives DERT/incremental DERT for valuation, which closely overlaps with the cited paper’s core contribution of analytical discounted expected transactions and RFM-to-CLV modeling. Given this strong methodological and valuation linkage (and a direct DOI match), this citation is plausibly foundational rather than a mere background mention.
